Usage:
  flaggroup deploy [flags]

Deploy the application.

Flags:
      --name string    Deployment name. [required]
      --verbose bool   Enable verbose logging. [default: "false"] [setby: appdefault] [current: "false"]

  Cache:
      --cache-ttl int      Cache TTL in seconds. [default: "300"] [setby: appdefault] [current: "300"]
      --redis-url string   Redis connection URL. [default: "redis://localhost:6379"] [setby: appdefault] [current: "redis://localhost:6379"]

  Database:
      --db-host string   Database host. [default: "localhost"] [setby: appdefault] [current: "localhost"]
      --db-name string   Database name. [required]
      --db-port int      Database port. [default: "5432"] [setby: appdefault] [current: "5432"]

  Scaling:
      --regions []string   Regions to deploy to.
      --replicas int       Number of replicas. [default: "1"] [setby: appdefault] [current: "1"]

Global Flags:
      --color string        Use ANSI colors [default: "auto"] [env: WARG_COLOR] [setby: appdefault] [current: "auto"]
  -h, --help string         Print help [default: "default"] [setby: appdefault] [current: "default"]
      --term-width string   Terminal width. Should be a positive integer, "auto", or "infinite". If "auto" the app will attempt to detect terminal width and fall back to 120 if detection fails [default: "auto"] [env: WARG_TERM_WIDTH] [setby: appdefault] [current: "auto"]
